watermark.valueCandidate: Steve AI says premium plans remove the Steve AI watermark.
watermark.snippet: Steve AI's watermark help article says upgrading to any premium plan removes the Steve AI watermark from videos.
watermark.sourceTitle: How do I remove the Steve AI watermark from the videos?

commercialUse.valueCandidate: Paid Steve AI plans include commercial rights and monetization rights.
commercialUse.snippet: Steve AI's commercialization help says paid plans include commercial rights so videos can be monetized across platforms.
commercialUse.sourceTitle: Can I monetize the videos I create with Steve.AI?

commercialUse.valueCandidate: Enterprise plan includes resell rights for client work.
commercialUse.snippet: Steve AI's website-use article says resell rights are available on the Enterprise plan for users selling videos as a service.
commercialUse.sourceTitle: Can I use AI-generated videos from Steve.AI on my website?

usageRights.valueCandidate: Steve AI says users fully own the videos they create.
usageRights.snippet: Steve AI help explicitly states that exported videos are yours to use, share, and monetize.
usageRights.sourceTitle: Do I fully own the videos I create on Steve.AI?

usageRights.valueCandidate: Steve AI prohibits using generative AI features to create content that violates copyright, trademark, privacy, or other third-party rights.
usageRights.snippet: Steve AI's AI Terms forbid using third-party brand logos, copyrighted uploads, or personal information without the relevant rights or consent.

refundCancellation.valueCandidate: Steve AI has no refund policy on subscription fees after the free plan evaluation path, and subscriptions are auto-renewing until canceled.
refundCancellation.snippet: The refund article says Steve AI does not offer a refund policy for subscription fees and explains that recurring subscriptions auto-renew until canceled.
refundCancellation.sourceTitle: How do I get a refund of my subscription fee?

refundCancellation.valueCandidate: Steve AI says plans can be canceled anytime with no cancellation charge.
refundCancellation.snippet: Steve AI's cancellation help says users can cancel at any time from My Plan and there is no cancellation charge.
refundCancellation.sourceTitle: Can I cancel the plan anytime, and are there any cancelation charges?

exportLimits.valueCandidate: Steve AI downloads projects as MP4 video files and premium plans offer resolution-based download options.
exportLimits.snippet: Steve AI help says projects currently download as MP4 and premium plans expose different download resolutions based on plan tier.
exportLimits.sourceTitle: What are the formats in which the project can be downloaded?

mainLimitations.valueCandidate: Steve AI caps generated videos at up to 20 minutes, with scene limits by format.
mainLimitations.snippet: Steve AI's duration help says projects can be up to 20 minutes, with 2D animation and live action up to 120 scenes and Gen AI videos up to 50 scenes.
mainLimitations.sourceTitle: What is the maximum video duration I can create with Steve.AI’s AI video maker?

workflowFeatureDocs.valueCandidate: Steve AI turns text, blogs, and audio into animated, live-action, and Gen AI videos.
workflowFeatureDocs.snippet: Steve AI's product overview describes transforming text, blogs, and audio into professional videos and supporting animated, live-action, and Gen AI formats.
workflowFeatureDocs.sourceTitle: What is Steve AI? | FAQ - Steve AI

workflowFeatureDocs.valueCandidate: Steve AI supports explainer videos, tutorials, product demos, social media videos, and educational content.
workflowFeatureDocs.snippet: The official FAQ lists explainer videos, tutorials, product demos, social media content, and educational modules among Steve AI use cases.
workflowFeatureDocs.sourceTitle: What type of videos can I create with Steve AI?

security.valueCandidate: Steve AI security includes 2FA, SSO, SSL encryption, TLS/SSL-only endpoints, AES-256 at rest, GDPR and CCPA alignment.
security.snippet: Steve AI's security FAQ references 2FA, SSO, SSL/TLS-only API endpoints, AES-256 data-at-rest encryption, and GDPR/CCPA compliance.
security.sourceTitle: How secure is Steve AI? | FAQ - Steve AI

api.valueCandidate: Steve AI says its API and application endpoints are TLS/SSL only.
api.snippet: The security FAQ explicitly states that API and application endpoints are TLS/SSL only.
api.sourceTitle: How secure is Steve AI? | FAQ - Steve AI

enterprise.valueCandidate: Steve AI offers SSO on the Enterprise plan.
enterprise.snippet: The SSO setup article says single sign-on is available for users on the Enterprise plan.
enterprise.sourceTitle: How do I set up SSO for my company? | FAQ - Steve AI
